metadata.name: Identify Top Performing Content of the Month

description: A content manager wants a report on the top 10 most-watched movies and TV shows on the streaming platform for the previous month.

nodes.task_description: Query the viewership database for all content watched last month.

expected_outcome.value: Agent retrieves the raw viewership data.

nodes.task_description: Aggregate the data by title and sort by total hours watched.

expected_outcome.value: Agent processes the data and ranks all content by viewership.

nodes.task_description: Generate a report listing the top 10 titles.

expected_outcome.value: Agent produces a clear, ranked list of the top 10 movies and shows.
